title: Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple
tagline: Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple, Kerala

overview.short: Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple in India, located in the state of Kerala.
overview.description: Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple is a Hindu temple in India, located in the state of Kerala. It is situated on Main Eastern Highway (SH-8) with its landmark temple ground in the village of Elamgulam in Kottayam district. The temple's annual festival features the captivating Gajamela (Elephant congregation) and Aanayoottu (Elephant feeding) ceremonies with around 15 elephants.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mallikassery
topPlaces.description: Mallikassery is a small village near Paika, in Elikulam Panchayat of Kanjirappally Taluk in Kottayam district, in the state of Kerala, India. The village lies between Paika and Pinnakkanad, along the Paika–Pinnakkanad road.

topPlaces.name: Panamattom
topPlaces.description: Panamattom or Panamattam is a large village in Kerala, India, a part of Kottayam district. It is located in Kanjirappally Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Elikkulam
topPlaces.description: Elikkulam is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located between the plantation towns of Kanjirapally and Palai, and is the northernmost boundary of Kanjirapally Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Thampalakad
topPlaces.description: Thampalakkad is a small village in Kottayam district, Kerala, which is located around 5 km from Kanjirappally on the way to Manjakuzhy. It has the same distance from Ponkunnam, Manjakuzhy, Koorali, Anakkal, Kappadu, Panamattom and Vanchimala.

topPlaces.name: Pallickathodu
topPlaces.description: Pallickathodu, also spelled Pallikkathodu which includes Anickadu village, is a town in eastern Kottayam district, Kerala, India. It falls under the Kanjirappally assembly constituency.

topPlaces.name: Kodungoor Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Kodungoor Devi Temple is a famous temple located at Kodungoor, Kerala, India. The primary deity of this temple is Kodungooramma.

topPlaces.name: Vazhoor
topPlaces.description: Vazhoor is a town in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is a village, panchayat and block with headquarters at Kodungoor on NH183.

topPlaces.name: Puthiyakavu Devi Temple
topPlaces.description: Puthiyakavu Devi Temple is a temple in Ponkunnam, Kerala, India. It is a resting place for Sabarimala pilgrims.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (72 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (64 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Elamgulam Sree Dharma Sastha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mallikassery, Panamattom, Elikkulam, Thampalakad, Pallickathodu.
